message: Node started: Propose a greedy or local search algorithm to maximize the sum of the board entries. Since the modulo 998244353 is much larger than the likely sum of a few stamp applications on a 9x9 board, treat the problem as maximizing the sum of elements. Consider evaluating the 'value' of each stamp placement (sum of its elements) and whether placing multiple stamps at the same location or overlapping locations is beneficial. Suggest a strategy like a greedy approach with look-ahead or a hill-climbing algorithm.
